title: The Randall Scandal: Love, Loathing, and Vanderpump
original_title: The Randall Scandal: Love, Loathing, and Vanderpump
overview: An investigation into many of the shocking claims against Emmett, which include allegations of race discrimination, workplace abuse, and questionable on-set behavior towards actor Bruce Willis as his mental acuity declined ― all of which Emmett denies.
